story.iWant: to see a clear checklist of what my domain needs before going live
story.soThat: I know everything is in place for callers to have a good experience

context.applies: When evaluating whether a domain is ready to receive calls
assumptions: Each domain needs a published playbook to route specs correctly
IDENTITY specs define who the agent is (required for any call)
CONTENT specs define what to teach (recommended for tutors)
System specs (PIPELINE-001, COMP-001) must be active for pipeline/composition
At least one AI engine must have an API key configured
playbook_spec_role checks both domain PlaybookItems AND system specs enabled via Playbook.config.systemSpecToggles

parameters.name: Domain Readiness Checks
parameters.description: Ordered list of checks to evaluate domain call-readiness. Each check has a severity (critical/recommended/optional), a query type for the executor, and a fix action link.

checks.name: Learning Programme Ready
checks.description: Your learning programme needs to be set up and activated before learners can start

checks.name: Persona Configured
checks.description: Your AI tutor needs a persona and teaching style set up for your programme

checks.name: Curriculum Content Linked
checks.description: Your programme needs curriculum content connected for the AI tutor to teach from

checks.name: Teaching Materials Linked
checks.description: Upload or link teaching materials so the AI tutor has content to teach from

checks.name: Teaching Points Ready
checks.description: Key facts and concepts need to be extracted from your teaching materials

checks.name: Welcome Experience Set Up
checks.description: Configure the welcome message and flow for your learners' first call

checks.name: Post-Call Analysis Ready
checks.description: The system that analyses calls after each session needs to be active

checks.name: Prompt System Ready
checks.description: The system that creates the AI tutor's instructions needs to be active

checks.name: AI Service Connected
checks.description: At least one AI service (Claude or OpenAI) needs to be connected

checks.name: Test Learner Added
checks.description: Add at least one test learner so you can preview the teaching experience

acceptanceCriteria.title: Critical checks block go-live
acceptanceCriteria.given: A domain with a failing critical check
acceptanceCriteria.then: The domain is marked as NOT READY and the fix action is shown

acceptanceCriteria.title: Recommended checks show warnings
acceptanceCriteria.given: A domain with all critical checks passing but some recommended failing
acceptanceCriteria.then: The domain is marked as ALMOST READY with warnings for missing items

acceptanceCriteria.title: All checks pass shows ready
acceptanceCriteria.given: A domain with all checks passing
acceptanceCriteria.then: The domain is marked as READY with a green indicator

constraints.description: Readiness check should complete in under 500ms (all queries parallelized)

related.title: Pipeline Configuration
related.relationship: Required system spec checked by readiness

related.title: Prompt Composition
related.relationship: Required system spec checked by readiness
